description: A wide, airy landscape showing a calm canal stretching from the foreground toward a cluster of buildings at mid-ground. A wooden crane or hoist structure stands at the left near the water's edge, where a blue boat is moored. The sky is expansive, filled with white and blue clouds rendered with short, broken brushstrokes. Green grasses and low vegetation line the canal banks. The palette is dominated by blues, greens, and warm earth tones.

_meta.title: The Loing Canal at Saint Mammes
